message:
feat(conformance): expand verification matrix and structured log types

Structured Log Enhancements:
- Add new log entry type variants for expanded tracing coverage
- Additional fields for capturing more detailed execution context

Verification Matrix:
- Major expansion of the conformance verification matrix with
  thousands of new test case entries
- Covers additional API families and edge cases
- Provides comprehensive coverage data for CI validation

This expansion significantly improves the conformance testing
surface area and enables more thorough validation of the
membrane's behavior across diverse scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
